name: SmartRAG: Native Graph-Based RAG for Mobile Device

description: arXiv:2607.14661v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Deploying large language models (LLMs) as personal assistants on mobile devices demands privacy, low latency, and offline availability, yet the computational cost of giant models clashes with strict edge-hardware budgets. We argue that this tension cannot be resolved by model compression alone; it requires decomposing on-device intelligence in...
author: Zhihan Jiang, Meng Li, Shenghao Liu, Keran Li, Ruiben Zhou, Wei Wang, Xianjun Deng, Shuai Wang, Haipeng Dai
